qa_pairs.question: What type of module system is configured in the provided XML snippet?
qa_pairs.answer: The XML snippet configures a module system of `type="module"`.

qa_pairs.question: For which scripting languages are initialization paths specified within this module system configuration, and what are those paths?
qa_pairs.answer: Initialization paths are specified for Perl (`/cvmfs/soft.computecanada.ca/custom/software/lmod/lmod/init/perl`), Python (`/cvmfs/soft.computecanada.ca/custom/software/lmod/lmod/init/env_modules_python.py`), and CSH (`/cvmfs/soft.computecanada.ca/custom/software/lmod/lmod/init/csh`).
